name: Squash Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup grated Cheddar or Mozzarella cheese
2 cups shredded raw zucchini or yellow squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the biscuit mix with the grated cheese, salt, and pepper.
2. Stir in the beaten eggs until the mixture is moist.
3. Fold in the shredded zucchini or yellow squash.
4. Using about 2 tablespoons of melted butter per fritter, sauté the fritters until brown on both sides.
5. Makes about 12 (3-inch) fritters.
